reviews.review_description: This is a good app for learning combos and form.  The coaches show what the movement should look like when shadow boxing, and then walk you through a routine to get comfortable with combos.  The combos include defensive moves (ducking) also.  I find it most helpful when using in MR next to a mirror, to see my form.

developer_response.body:
We're so glad you are enjoying Rumble!

Joyce
Litesport

reviews.review_description: I am really so grateful that there are people who make this possible for me under VR. It's so helpful! The videos of the trainers standing around in the room are flat and not really high-resolution.  But the content and the teaching of the individual lessons are extremely good and comprehensive. Thank you thank you thank you!

I just had a look to see what it would cost to take Rumble Boxing classes and it's $35 per class. I got this app for 8.99 (on sale) and it includes 50 classes!  I bought this app to learn proper form to prevent injury playing other games. I read other reviews that said they had problems with the bag because they're short. I'm short and didn't have any problems, so maybe that was fixed? If I experience a problem ,I'll update this review but it's perfect so far. All of the apps by this company are great 
 and a bargain even at full price. I wish they’d add DLC packs and a yoga app. I’d be happy to give this company more money! More HITT classes please and workouts with weights.

I have all your apps except the one for the exercise bike, and I think they're fantastic. But here are some suggestions to improve them:

Add the option to remove floor exercises in all apps. Also, include the possibility of a personalized workout to be done standing or sitting, where you can choose the duration and the muscle groups to strengthen.

Add a seated mode as well. The boxing app has a bug: the punching bag should be movable. Often, the position is incorrect even after resetting the boundaries and view.

Create a dedicated app for weight training.
Create a dedicated app to improve posture.
Create a dedicated app to improve balance.

I have no logged 3 support requests for this app.  I like the trainers and the style of the app however I am continually encountering issues.
- There are no new sessions and no in-app purchases which are indicated on the description in the meta store
- Last week there was an issue with the app that it did not load and the developers had no idea so it seems the support lacks any attention. I will confirm the issue was fixed once I logged a support ticket.
Simply Awesome for Beginners and Advanced. I am completely out of breath but the Trainers are explaining everything very professional. It feels like in a real class! A must have! Recommended!

I’ve been using Les Mills XR primarily but this a great complementary workout. The shadow boxing + HIIT workouts are good. You won’t be sweating as much or breathing as hard as you will with Les Mills, but you nonetheless feel it after a 20-30 minute workout. Highly recommend for the price!

4/4/25 Update: I do several workouts a week. The boxing + strength classes are awesome. Very good workout. I wish they would add expansion packs. I would happily pay for more workouts. Hopefully they’ll be expanding the workouts soon.

reviews.review_title: Fantastic workout with one flaw. Oversiz
reviews.review_description:
I started playing this game because I was looking for something new after spending a year with my last game. The setup and coaching in this game are absolutely amazing, and they make the experience engaging and enjoyable. However, the major downside for me is the punching bag. It’s simply too big!

I find myself spending more time running around the bag, trying to hit the target, which disrupts the flow of the workout. Unfortunately, there’s no way to calibrate or choose different bags to suit your size or preferences. For smaller players or those with shorter reach, it’s challenging to hit the side angles and underneath.

If the developers could address this detail and add customization options for different bag sizes, this would easily be a 5-star game for me. I hope they consider this feedback.

My 60th year and I can't get enough of Rumble boxing. I've never had any boxing training before but this is so easy to learn and train with. Also has helped in recuperation of my torn rotator cuff. Never felt better, or fitter.
Great workouts, but how can you adjust the sandbag? It hangs to low

developer_response.body:
Hey Veritatus,

Thank you for leaving your feedback and trying out Rumble Boxing! 

We apologize, but at this time there isn't an option to lower or raise the bag. We will let our team know you are interested in that feature for the future. You may want to try to reset your headset view (press and hold the Meta button/oculus icon until your view resets) to see if that adjusts the bag to the ideal height. 

Hope this helps and thanks again for taking time to leave a review!

reviews.review_description: I loved Thrill of the Fight, great boxing VR but it throws you in the deep end of the pool. There was virtual gym with all the usual equipment but no instruction on how to actually box. Now this app contains everything that's missing from that game. I'm a couple of days in and the difference is everything. I can throw punches with confidence, learn how to move, do the exercise routines, a little weightlifting and I see genuine improvements. I loved the MR tutorials, they are actually fun and keep to a solid pace. The best part is taking what I learned in this app and applying it to Thrill of the Fight. I used to throw punches like jumping slaps, now I'm throwing combinations and knocking fighters out properly.
If I wanted someone yapping at me when I'm trying to punch, I'd get a personal trainer.
Good work out and as somebody who has practiced  Muay Thai boxing and traditional boxing for years, I can say it’s very good teaching you fundamentals and giving you a good workout.

reviews.review_title: Definitely the best fitness app now!!!
reviews.review_description: Wow this is quality, if you’re looking to get a great workout and if you already box or want to learn to box this is it!!! I can’t rave about this enough I’m all in on this. Get it get it get it

reviews.review_title: Impressed with the strength and boxing
reviews.review_description:
The class format with the recoveries felt timed right the instructors are great and felt engaged within the workout.

The mixed reality is a great feature when doing a strength class and made it felt more immersive.
I have ALL the combat games on Oculus.  This is the best training program I have come across.  Great price.  I highly recommend getting it.

I was hoping for something more gameified like Les Mills, so this isn’t a keeper for me - but I have to say, the coaching is very good, with clearly explained intros to the different punches, plus weight work and HIIT too. For me, there’s nothing I’m not getting with my Apple Fitness+ subscription - but for a one-off price of £11, this is great if you’re new to VR boxing and want to box along in a studio environment. I especially like the 2 MR modes, one of which puts you in the studio but leaves your real room just around your body and legs, so you can still watch your form and keep an eye on your footwork. Excellent app design.
I really enjoy this app - is complimentary to Les Mills, but is a nice change with the high intensity for legs and core work.

Rumble is my favorite workout studio.  This app does a great job making it feel like you're in the studio.  The trainers are there during the full workout unlike other fitness apps.  MR also is great for the strength/weights sections.   Hard to beat the price!

I purchased this September 16 2024. It is awsome. I a
m doing at least one routine on my day on work and two on my off days
